context_stub.player_mapping_strategy: pid-sleeper-<external_player_id> for every player in the players fixture

diagnostic.note: Sleeper transactions nest player IDs in `adds`/`drops` dicts and use `roster_ids` (plural array). The current TransactionMapper.map_sleeper_fields reads `player_id` and `roster_id` (singular) directly off the transaction, so every Sleeper transaction fails validation_transaction (missing pid, tid) and is skipped. The 0/296 mapped figure here is the authentic mapper output and exposes this gap; tests built on this output should treat it as a regression baseline until the mapper is extended to fan adds/drops out into multiple internal transactions.
